title: 대통령실, 국정 개혁 안 발표
summary: 대통령실이 정부 운영 혁신과 투명성 강화을 위한 국정 개혁안을 발표했습니다.
content: The presidential office announced comprehensive government reform measures today. The plan focuses on improving public service efficiency. Digital transformation of government services is a key priority. Anti-corruption measures will be strengthened across all ministries. Civil servants will undergo updated training programs. Citizen feedback channels will be expanded. International cooperation models will be studied. The reform aims to restore public trust. Implementation will begin in the second quarter. A special task force has been established. Progress reports will be released monthly.
